content.en:
Forbidden Void Realm.

Ye Tian entered here to cultivate, so that he could have a thousand times more time than others.

Soon.

The corpses of the forbidden zerg were taken out by him, and then began to sacrifice to the origin of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

Subsequently, the Xuanxu Ancient Realm descended the power of the Origin, and made Ye Tian's cultivation speed increase a lot again.

However, before the retreat, he fused the two forbidden talents that he copied into his hand, and the forbidden talent Dark Spear was more powerful than before, but the forbidden talent that interested Ye Tian the most was - hidden!

The forbidden talent is very practical, and once it is cast, it can be perfectly integrated into the void of the dark forbidden realm.

With his current strength, if he casts the Forbidden Talent Hidden, I am afraid that even the Invincible Dao Ancestor and the Commander-level Forbidden Zerg will be difficult to sense his existence, and only the Half-Step Domain Ancestor can truly sense his existence.

Hide!

Ye Tian's body disappeared, perfectly blending into the void of the Forbidden Void Realm.

Immediately, he walked in the Forbidden Void Realm, passing by many Dao Ancestors, and even passing by his wife Xiao Yue's side, she didn't notice it.

"Very good ability, entering the dark forbidden realm in the future is more secure!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Next, he began to cultivate with all his might,

In the blink of an eye, 1,000 years had passed in the outside world, and Ye Tian had been cultivating in the Forbidden Void Realm for a long, long time, his physical strength, forbidden Dao power, and soul power had reached the limit of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, if he didn't break the shackles, there would be no way to continue to improve.

Moreover, his forbidden Dao technique was about to be realized.

Ye Tian decided, once he comprehended the Forbidden Dao Technique, he would immediately impact the Supreme Dao Ancestor realm.

In the blink of an eye, another 50 years had passed in the outside world, and Ye Tian had finally comprehended his own forbidden Dao technique in the Forbidden Void Realm.

Forbidden Void Realm.

Ye Tian stood in the empty forbidden void, and with a wave of his hand, a black spear exuding terrifying forbidden rules appeared.

Burst!

The void was pierced by a black spear, and the power was unknown how many times more powerful than a normal forbidden spear.

Contains the unique taboo rules of the Dao Technique itself, which is the Forbidden Dao Technique.

And there is no doubt that this Dao technique that Ye Tian performed is already a forbidden Dao technique, surpassing the strongest Dao technique, but it can only be regarded as the lowest level of forbidden Dao technique, in the eyes of the half-step domain ancestors, such a forbidden Dao technique is afraid that it is not very qualified.

But for Ye Tian, being able to create such a forbidden Dao technique was already very remarkable.

"If other people know that I haven't even created a Xeon Dao Technique, but I have created a Forbidden Dao Technique that surpasses the Xeon Dao Technique, I'm afraid they will be dumbfounded!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

However, he can also create the Extreme Dao Technique now, but it is not necessary, it will not help his strength much, only the Forbidden Dao Technique can make his strength skyrocket.

For example, now, although he has not yet stepped into the realm of the Supreme Dao Ancestor, his combat power is already above that of ordinary Supreme Dao Ancestors, which is comparable to that of the Blue Sky Dao Ancestor.

Once he stepped into the ranks of the Supreme Dao Ancestor, his combat power was estimated to soar directly to the level of the Wind King.

"This forbidden Dao technique, I comprehended the forbidden Dao technique based on the forbidden talent: Dark Spear, so let's name it the Dark Extreme Dao Spear!"

Ye Tian took the name.

Next, Ye Tian planned to break through to the Supreme Dao Ancestor.

He walked out of the Forbidden Void Realm, returned to the Terran Realm, and began to retreat and break through to the ranks of the Supreme Dao Ancestors.

Time passed day by day.

this day.

The void of the Terran Territory is surging, the rules of the Great Dao are pervasive, and the origin of the Mysterious Ancient Realm has descended.

Now.

The powerful Dao Ancestors of many forces looked at the territory of the Terran Race.

"The human race is about to give birth to the strongest Dao Ancestor?"

"Is it the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor, his cultivation speed is too terrifying, he has become the strongest Dao Ancestor so quickly!"

"I heard before that the combat power of the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor is very strong, even stronger than the ghost son, once he breaks through to the ranks of the strongest Dao Ancestor, I am afraid that the strength is far beyond that of ordinary Supreme Dao Ancestor!"

......

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian had broken the shackles at this moment and was promoted to the ranks of the strongest Dao Ancestors, his body was transforming into a supreme Dao body, and the forbidden Dao power had become more refined and powerful, far surpassing the previous forbidden Dao power, and even the soul had become more pure, and it was engraved with the forbidden origin rules.

At this moment, Ye Tian seemed to have become the embodiment of the Forbidden Dao, and his every move could mobilize the taboo rules between heaven and earth.

"Very strong, very strong, far stronger than before, I'm afraid the Wind King is not necessarily my opponent!"

Ye Tian estimated.

What's more, he has just been promoted to the strongest Dao Ancestor, whether it is forbidden Dao power or physical strength, he can continue to improve, unless he is promoted to a certain level, it will slow down, otherwise the initial improvement is very fast.

In addition, his Forbidden Dao Technique Dark Extreme Dao Spear had just been created, and it was considered an entry level, and he had not yet cultivated to an extremely advanced level.

Therefore, once Ye Tian specializes in cultivating the Dark Extreme Dao Spear, his strength will skyrocket.

"I have copied and fused several forbidden talents: the Dark Spear, cultivating the Dark Extreme Dao Spear, this forbidden Dao technique, is countless times easier than the half-step domain ancestors, at most they can raise a forbidden Dao technique to the Xiaocheng realm, but I can definitely easily cultivate a forbidden Dao technique to the Dacheng or even consummation, and even the extreme level!"

Ye Tian said very confidently.

-----------------

has just been promoted to the strongest Dao Ancestor, and a Supreme Dao Ancestor has come to the human race and has come to congratulate him.

Some of these Supreme Dao Ancestors came from the Eightfold Heaven Forces, and some came from the Ninth Heaven Forces.

Ye Tian entertained them one by one, maybe they were enemies before, but now that the major forces are cooperating, they are allies, and Ye Tian naturally will not ignore them.

Among them, many Supreme Dao Ancestors wanted to cooperate with Ye Tian to hunt the Forbidden Zerg, but Ye Tian politely refused one by one.

He didn't want to cooperate with these Supreme Dao Ancestors, it wasn't cooperation, it was to protect them.

Besides, he could completely cooperate with the supreme Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain, why should he cooperate with them?

this day.

Ye Tian came to the small realm of the king of time, and met the Eternal Dao Ancestor who had just returned from the dark forbidden realm, and the other party came back specifically for Ye Tian to hold the canonization ceremony of the Ten Kings for him.

That's right, Ye Tian became the strongest Dao Ancestor and became one of the Ten Kings!
